title: erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. virgatum
intro: Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. virgatum, also known as Wolf's Bane, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) with a tall, upright habit and yellow or white flowers. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Wolf's Bane are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Wolf's Bane can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
